meaning: vt.吩咐,命令,嘱咐,<主美>禁止
examples: Paretic in, enjoin limb knees hip flexor.
And can it be that good policy does not equally enjoin it?
And I hereby enjoin upon people so declared to be free to abstain from all violence.
Finally, the fact that an arbitrator cannot enjoin a court from proceeding is true but irrelevant.
Right now the decision is limited to whether or not they will enjoin the lockout.
